About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: We are dedicated to providing high-quality content and excellent service.
About.missionDesc: Our mission is to create a modern, accessible, and performant web experience that serves our community with valuable content and resources.
About.whatWeDoDesc: We publish articles on technology, development, and best practices. Our team works hard to bring you the latest insights and tutorials.
About.howWeBuildDesc: Built with Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Tailwind CSS. Open source at heart, we believe in transparency and collaboration.
About.qualityDesc: We prioritize depth and substance in everything we create
About.accessibilityDesc: Building inclusive experiences that work for everyone
About.performanceDesc: Blazing-fast load times and smooth interactions
About.continuousDesc: Always learning, evolving, and pushing boundaries
About.getInTouchDesc: Have questions or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.
